cases.name: spawn_run_collect_roundtrip
cases.observed: spawn=Ok("spawned subagent \"rt-1\" (depth 1); poll it with check_subagent_status") | status: completed | note: loop ended: Answered | tool_calls: list_dir(.) | answer: | ROUNDTRIP-OK

cases.name: concurrency_cap_enforced
cases.observed: a=Ok("spawned subagent \"cap-a\" (depth 1); poll it with check_subagent_status") b=Err("subagent concurrency cap reached (1/1); wait for one to finish (check_subagent_status)")

cases.name: depth_limit_enforced
cases.observed: d=Err("subagent depth limit reached (1 >= 1); deeper spawning is disabled")

cases.name: timeout_reaps_to_inconclusive
cases.observed: status: inconclusive | note: subagent timed out and was terminated | tool_calls:  | answer: |

cases.name: malformed_result_handled
cases.observed: status: failed | note: result file is malformed (key must be a string at line 1 column 3)
